scripts.ci:backend: npm --prefix backend run format:check && npm --prefix backend run test:ci
scripts.ci:frontend: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('frontend/dist',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && npm --prefix frontend exec prettier --check . --ignore-path .prettierignore && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run build && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('frontend/dist',{ recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.ci:local: npm run ci:backend && npm run ci:frontend
